notes: The claim remains scoped to Conflict Resolution and Test-Time Learning.
Both metrics use deterministic upstream match-mode scoring with no LLM judge.
Accurate Retrieval and Long-Range Understanding remain excluded because historical no-memory controls did not show a memory lift.

run.command: GOODMEMORY_ASSISTED_EXTRACTOR_MODEL=gpt-5.6-terra bun run eval:phase-64-smoke -- --benchmark-root ~/.cache/goodmemory-benchmarks/MemoryAgentBench --live --evidence-pack --competency CR --resume --run-id run-phase72-mab-generalized-cr-terra; GOODMEMORY_ASSISTED_EXTRACTOR_MODEL=gpt-5.6-terra bun run eval:phase-64-smoke -- --benchmark-root ~/.cache/goodmemory-benchmarks/MemoryAgentBench --live --evidence-pack --competency TTL --resume --run-id run-phase72-mab-generalized-ttl-terra; bun run scripts/run-phase-72-release-gate.ts

artifacts.description: Phase 72 generalized benchmark release gate with source-report fingerprints

metrics.primary: Conflict Resolution answer accuracy using deterministic upstream match-mode scoring; Test-Time Learning is co-reported under the same judge-free boundary.

coverage.note: CR covers all 73 questions and scores 70/73 = 0.9589041096. TTL covers all 30 questions and scores 28/30 = 0.9333333333. Both runs have executionFailures 0 and use deterministic upstream match-mode scoring. The established no-memory baseline is 0.000 for both. AR and LRU remain excluded from this claim because prior controls did not establish a memory lift.

claimBoundary.reason: Current v0.6.0 public-opt-in evidence with complete CR/TTL coverage, zero execution failures, deterministic judge-free scoring, verified non-vendored MIT dataset, reproducible commands and source commit, and a 0.000 no-memory baseline. The claim excludes AR/LRU rather than averaging in non-memory wins.
